Camin  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded January 28th, 2019 by wiscookie

Given him a note from Solomen in Temple of Solusek to get exp and TrueSpirit faction.

  • This mob spawns at The Vasty Deep Inn on the 2nd floor. First door on the left at loc -1166, -11, 84.
  • Respawn Timer: 1 to 3 days after a server restart.

Categories: Templatized | EverQuest
This page last modified 2025-06-14 14:41:16.

Level: 50
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Items Given:
Ro's Breath [I know who you are.]

Known Habitats:
  Erudin
Factions Decreased:
  Truespirit
Quests:
  Wizard Epic: Staff of the Four

Report a correction

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
On Server Restart, Can Take 1-3 Days To Spawn
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2025 at 3:04 PM Rating: Excellent
Brickhaus
Sage
101 posts
Direct from a developer's mouth:
https://forums.everquest.com/index.php?threads/wizard-epic-npc-camin-isnt-in-the-game.304476/#post-4386772

He has a long respawn time after a server restart (since servers restarted yesterday in the morning). Maybe 1-3 days.


Reposting here in case any TLPer is wondering...

-1158, -11 in the Vastly Inn upstairs. Turning in 1k plat for Truespirit faction hits, no longer works... Unless your doing the Wizard 1.0 and are at that specific point.

▲ Page top
Camin
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2005 at 5:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781485353
132 posts
From the posts I see here and the fact that I have been to see him 3 times and he wasnt there could Sony have done anything to make this harder?
If Camin has a 36+ hr respawn time that seems ridiculuos for an NPC that you just have to talk to. I was also told he was on a 17 hr respawn timer as well.
I have started going to Erudin on Thursday this past week at lvl 49, no Camin. Thought it might be lvl restricted so tried again today at lvl 50 and lvl 51 and still no Camin.
Did an /ooc and no one said they had seen him recently.
Is this broke or is it contrary?
Can anyone confirm what kind of timer he is on if any?
▲ Page top
RE: Camin
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2005 at 2:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781485353
132 posts
I finally found Camin shortly after writing this last post.
I found him--Game time 02/27/3196 12AM---Earth Time 12/11/2005 10:46 AM.
This does roughly correspond with a 72 hr respawn time after a server reset. Major patch was done Thursday morning.
Just thought I would let you know and I also know of 3 Wizards doing their Epics 1.0 at the same time. Good luck to the others in finding their mobs, I am sure it will be "fun?".
▲ Page top

# Jan 15 2003 at 12:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758354196
37 posts
Ok doing the first first turn
After you give Camin the leter and you get the faction up

he still will not talk to me..

I would rather not eat the 1k plat so ..

Should I waste my time trying to figure out how to get faction ..

or should I just try the 1k and hope for the best.

I have herd both sides saying yes do it or no don't..

I went to Camin and coned him and he was apprehensively so I handed him 1000pp and he still coned the same... do I have to keep doing this? I'm going to loose a ton of money this way
▲ Page top
Money talks
QuoteReply
# May 25 2002 at 8:18 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I also wasn't sure whether to give him the plat. He conned apprehensive to me, I gave him the note, and asked "what are you searching for?". He said "Oh look...a talking lump of refuse...how novel." I almost nuked him, but handed over the money instead (crossing fingers). It worked! Quest continues!
▲ Page top
WHEW!
QuoteReply
# May 12 2002 at 2:54 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Well I gave to note to camin and then hailed him..he said go away...so I sat down..and flipped a coin..and it was tails I was to give him the 1k plat anyway and try my luck...IT WORKED!
I was sweating bullets..but it did work..and I got more truespirit faction and he finished talking to me as if I was ok in the 1st place..so yes guys and gals it does work this way...WHOOT!

Gglak
lvl 40 Wiz Enigmatic Counsil
Terris-Thule
▲ Page top
Truespirit Faction
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2002 at 6:04 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I don't know if the quest works if he won't talk to you, I do know the 1,000 PP SURE isn't worth losing so before I handed him in the money I made sure he would talk to me. This is how I did it. I got the assistance of a druid and an enchanter. The druid stayed with me, and the chanter stayed at the camp site. We went to Butcherblock Mountains and killed Peg Leg (VERY easy at our levels, and should be by the time you need to undertake this). When the wolf spirit thing spawned the chanter charmed him. He would then speak to me. Just say "I wish to learn more" and he gives you a mini gem. Leave the chanter there to keep the spirit charmed. Druid and I went to N. Freeport to the tunnels and turned in the gem to the shaman NPC. Positive TrueSpirit faction adjustment. Bind. Druid port to BB, talk to spirit, gate, hand in gem, repeat. I did it 6 times and Camin will now speak to me. Only problem is...after I collected the money to give to him I don't know where he went :(
Any help on his exact re-spawn time would be GREATLY appreciated.
▲ Page top
stuck already on my epic
QuoteReply

I gave the note. no faction. I hailed and he ssaid 'Go away! I have no time for you!". I said 'What are you searching for?' (per graffe) and he said "Is that your BREATH? - Leave my presence!". Now what? should I risk the 1kpp?
